MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWER, STEVEN D. HEARING SET FOR AUG-04-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO: FORM INTERROGATORIES SET #1, REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET #1, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET #1, AND TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PLAINTIFF IS FURTHER ORDERED TO CONTACT COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT TO SCHEDULE HIS DEPOSITION. THE DEPOSITION IS TO BE COMPLETED BY DECEMBER 17, 2004. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $676.30, TO BE PAID ON OR BEFORE DECEMBER 17, 2004. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOWER, STEVEN D. HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-2004 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
